mapper.insert: INSERT INTO writing_exam_metadata (metadata_id, exam_type, task_type, min_words, recommended_max_words, max_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{metadataId}, #{examType}, #{taskType}, #{minWords}, #{recommendedMaxWords}, #{maxScore}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_exam_metadata SET exam_type = #{examType}, task_type = #{taskType}, min_words = #{minWords}, recommended_max_words = #{recommendedMaxWords}, max_score = #{maxScore}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE metadata_id = #{metadataId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, metadata_id, exam_type, task_type, min_words, recommended_max_words, max_score, created_at, updated_at FROM writing_exam_metadata WHERE metadata_id = #{metadataId} LIMIT 1
